title: The Plan Splits Across Dressrosa
description: Pages 5–8 focus on the plan splits across dressrosa, keeping the Dressrosa conflict centered on the characters active in this scene.
scene: This part follows Bartolomeo, Don Chinjao, Luffy, Marines, Unknown person #10, Unknown person #11, Unknown person #12 as law faces Doflamingo and Fujitora as the Caesar exchange collapses, while Luffy’s group remains tied up in the Colosseum and Dressrosa’s secrets.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Since that time, I've read all the articles about the Strawhat crew....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: It was all so thrilling!! So much so that I, an under- world boss with 150 towns under my control back in my Homeland at my Peak...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: I've got your enemy's pinky here, boss!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: looked up to Luffy-senpai as an idol and role model!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: And at long last decided to set out to sea myself....!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: OK now. Just try saying something again. Try acting like you're worth something.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Going on and talking about Luffy-senpai as if you're better than him....!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: You're NOTHING COMPARED TO HIM, YOU STUPID BASTARD!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Be a good boy and release my blade!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Why do we have to fight now? I'm tired!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: We shouldn't get close. They're danger- OUS!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: th... that's right, we shouldn't get too close. Even now, how could I, after all this time? I'm so nervous... no way I'm going over there...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: That scar under his eye... it's the real thing. It's so freaking cool. Huh? I can't see through all these tears.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: That rotten cabbage asshole!! I'd tear you limb from limb to protect him, but...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Listen up!! My grandfather has got some- thing he wants to say to you!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Give it a rest! I won already, didn't I?

dialogue.speaker: Don Chinjao
dialogue.text: "I can no longer resent GARP.... now I must express my deepest gratitude...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Please... accept my thanks for what you have done!!

dialogue.speaker: Don Chinjao
dialogue.text: Please don't go... Grandson of GARP...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Uwahh!! He passed by me! We were so close!! Um, excuse me... wait...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: O!! you can't run away from a fight!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: wh....wh... what do I do what do I do. I want to talk to him, but what would I say!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: As thanks for restor- ing my head...

dialogue.speaker: Marines
dialogue.text: the Happou Navy of my grandchil- Dren....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Why can't I just find somewhere to relax!

summary: Pages 5–8 focus on the plan splits across dressrosa, keeping the Dressrosa conflict centered on the characters active in this scene.
